document_info.prepared_by: Marcus Jennings, Senior Vice President, Capitol Insurance Advisors

business_description.nature_of_business: Boutique hotel ownership and management with integrated restaurant and event operations across Central and South Texas

coverages_discussed.notes: Coverage requested for approximately 285 employees across all operations
Commercial General Liability with occurrence limits
Coverage for all scheduled locations on a special form with replacement cost valuation

positives: Contractual risk transfer provisions in all subcontractor and vendor agreements
Employee assistance program and workplace wellness initiative in place for over five years
Comprehensive fleet management program with GPS tracking and driver training in place since 2023
Dedicated safety committee meets monthly and conducts quarterly site audits
Formal return-to-work program has reduced lost-time claims by over 30%
Favorable experience modification factor of 0.94 reflecting strong loss control relative to class peers
Structured HR program with low turnover and consistent safety training
concerns: Account experienced a cancellation in 2022-2023 with Zurich Insurance Group (insured cancelled - moved to current carrier)
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: 38 total claims with $511,891.20 in total paid losses and $714,517.96 total incurred. 11 claims open, 27 closed. Annualized loss ratio 21.6% (avg annual incurred $142,903.59 against current annual premium $660,422.75 over 5 loss years). WC: 28 claims, $324,545.30 paid, $415,934.50 incurred. GL: 8 claims, $8,779.76 paid, $82,656.15 incurred. Property: 2 claims, $178,566.14 paid, $215,927.31 incurred.

extracted_text_sections.executive_summary: We are pleased to submit Hill Country Hospitality Partners, LLC for your review and consideration. The insured is a boutique hotel ownership and management with integrated restaurant and event operations across Central and South Texas, headquartered in Austin, with approximately 16 years of operating history. Coverage is requested for Workers' Compensation, General Liability, Commercial Property.
extracted_text_sections.operations_description: Boutique hotel ownership and management with integrated restaurant and event operations across Central and South Texas, headquartered in Austin, with approximately 16 years of operating history.
extracted_text_sections.safety_programs: Employee assistance program and workplace wellness initiative in place for over five years. Comprehensive fleet management program with GPS tracking and driver training since 2023. Dedicated safety committee meets monthly and conducts quarterly site audits. Formal return-to-work program has reduced lost-time claims by over 30%. Structured HR program with consistent safety training.
extracted_text_sections.claims_narrative: The claims history warrants review; management has implemented corrective measures to address identified exposures. Over the review period, the insured has incurred 38 total claims with $511,891.20 in total paid losses and $714,517.96 total incurred. Currently, 11 claims remain open and 27 have been closed. Annualized loss ratio is 21.6% (avg annual incurred $142,903.59 against current annual premium $660,422.75 over 5 loss years). Account experienced a cancellation in 2022-2023 with Zurich Insurance Group. Reason: Insured cancelled - moved to current carrier.
